data.name: ERROR_AccountUnAuthorized
data.value: Your account has no permission to access.

data.name: ERROR_FullFillTheForm
data.value: Full fill the form to continue.

data.name: ERROR_NotEnoughMaterial
data.value: Not enough materials in WIP warehouse!

data.name: ERROR_NotFile
data.value: Can't get data from excel file or upload file with no data

data.name: MSG_ConfirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this information?

data.name: MSG_ConfirmToLogout
data.value: Select "Logout" below if you are ready to end your current session.

data.name: MSG_NewPasswordAndConfirmPasswordIsNotCorrect
data.value: New Password And Confirm Password Is Not Correct

data.name: WARN_NotSelectOnGrid
data.value: No value on grid has been chosen.

data.name: WARN_WOIsNotTheFirstProcess
data.value: This WO is NOT the first process !

data.name: WARN_WOIsTheFirstProcess
data.value: This WO is the first process !

data.name: ERROR_AllowPopupForWEB
data.value: You must allow popups for this map to work.

data.name: DbTbl_NamePOPlanning
data.value: Please input the name of the PO Plan

data.name: DbTbl_NameMRPlanning
data.value: Please input the name of the MR Plan

data.name: ERROR_Valuegreaterthan
data.value: Do not enter a value greater than the planned value.

data.name: ERROR_ApplicatorAndSeqExist
data.value: Applicator code and SEQ already exist

data.name: Btn_CheckMatchSNP
data.value: Packing of goods lacking standard quantity

data.name: ERROR_Different
data.value: Different item Code or ECN no

data.name: ERROR_FullBox
data.value: Package is full, can not add more

data.name: MSG_AddPackingItem
data.value: Add more item to packing box

data.name: MSG_UnikeyTurnOff
data.value: Please turn off Unikey or any Vietnamese input methods before scanning the code to ensure accurate data!
